_comment: Curated MCP config for the TRV Outpost desktop sidebar. The Electron host injects TRVE_DASHBOARD_URL and TRVE_DASHBOARD_KEY into the spawn env before launching `claude`; this file references them via ${VAR} expansion so the same template works whether the user has an API-key-bootstrapped server or a Clerk-bootstrapped one. Edit at your own risk — if you tear this up, use the Reset Sidebar Workspace menu option to restore it.
